title: kanbusr fails with 'invalid type: string "critical", expected struct PriorityDefinition'
description: kanbusr commands (list, show, create) fail with config parsing error. Beads (bd) works fine with same data. Error: 'invalid type: string "critical", expected struct PriorityDefinition'. Needs investigation of config format compatibility between kanbusr and beads.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter
